text:
Spotted Leeches (マダライトヒル, Madaraito Hiru) are a species of leeches that within less than a day lay their eggs in the bladder of living beings, and then die. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 76 

Appearance

The spotted leech is about three inches long and has a thin, longitudinal appearance like most of its related species. 

Behavior

These leeches enter through a physical wound and lay eggs in the victim's bladder. It takes them at least a day to reach the bladder, lay their eggs, and die. The hatched eggs will then be excreted along with urine, but the process is too painful and causes immediate death to the victim. However, the eggs need a strong and stable alkaline environment to hatch. If the pH is too low, the unhatched eggs will evacuate painlessly with the urine. An easy method to accomplish this is to keep drinking alcohol and urinate often until the urine turns from black to white. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Shadow Beast Leech injects the leeches into Uvogin's open wound made by Rabid Dog, but is instantly killed by Uvogin after explaining them in detail. Once Uvogin finishes off the other two Shadow Beasts, he asks Shizuku to use Blinky to suck out Rabid Dog's poison and Leech's leeches. Shizuku says that she can remove the poison, but reminds him that her ability does not work on living things. Shalnark moves in closer and identifies the species of leech, explaining the process in detail and adding that they need an alkaline environment for the eggs to hatch. He assures Uvogin that the unhatched eggs will painlessly pass with his urine if the pH is too low, telling them to drink beer constantly and urinate as much as possible for the next 24 hours. Squishing one of the leeches in his hand, he finally assures Uvogin that he will know he's fine once his urine turns from black to white. 

Before his fight with Kurapika, Uvogin manages to urinate all of the leech eggs safely out of his system. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 81
